CHANGELOG

Changelog for package jsk_3rdparty

2.1.31 (2025-05-13)

  • jsk_3rdparty/package.xml: add emotion_analyzer, gdrive_Ros, voccevox, remove slic
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.30 (2025-05-10)

2.1.29 (2025-01-05)

2.1.28 (2023-07-24)

2.1.27 (2023-06-24)

2.1.26 (2023-06-14)

  • add LICENSE files (#476)
  • remove rosbuild packages from jsk_3rdparty/package.xml (#475)
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.25 (2023-06-08)

  • [OSQP] add a wrapper package for OSQP, which is a library to solve QP (#442)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo in package.xml (#426)
  • Add nfc_ros (#406)
  • add zdepth and zdepth_image_transport package (#389)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] list all packages in jsk_3rdparty (#424)
  • Contributors: Aoi Nakane, Kei Okada, Koki Shinjo, Moju Zhao, Naoto Tsukamoto, Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.24 (2021-07-26)

2.1.23 (2021-07-21)

2.1.22 (2021-06-10)

  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo of dirname (#238)
  • Contributors: Koki Shinjo

2.1.21 (2020-08-19)

2.1.20 (2020-08-07)

2.1.19 (2020-07-21)

2.1.18 (2020-07-20)

2.1.17 (2020-04-16)

2.1.16 (2020-04-16)

2.1.15 (2019-12-12)

  • add gdrive_ros package (#182)
  • [dialogflow_task_executive] add dialogflow_task_executive run_depend in jsk_3rdparty (#183)
  • Contributors: Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.14 (2019-11-21)

  • Add sesame_ros package (#176)
  • Contributors: Yuto Uchimi

2.1.13 (2019-07-10)

2.1.12 (2019-05-25)

Changelog for package jsk_3rdparty

2.1.31 (2025-05-13)

  • jsk_3rdparty/package.xml: add emotion_analyzer, gdrive_Ros, voccevox, remove slic
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.30 (2025-05-10)

2.1.29 (2025-01-05)

2.1.28 (2023-07-24)

2.1.27 (2023-06-24)

2.1.26 (2023-06-14)

  • add LICENSE files (#476)
  • remove rosbuild packages from jsk_3rdparty/package.xml (#475)
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.25 (2023-06-08)

  • [OSQP] add a wrapper package for OSQP, which is a library to solve QP (#442)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo in package.xml (#426)
  • Add nfc_ros (#406)
  • add zdepth and zdepth_image_transport package (#389)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] list all packages in jsk_3rdparty (#424)
  • Contributors: Aoi Nakane, Kei Okada, Koki Shinjo, Moju Zhao, Naoto Tsukamoto, Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.24 (2021-07-26)

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package jsk_3rdparty

2.1.31 (2025-05-13)

  • jsk_3rdparty/package.xml: add emotion_analyzer, gdrive_Ros, voccevox, remove slic
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.30 (2025-05-10)

2.1.29 (2025-01-05)

2.1.28 (2023-07-24)

2.1.27 (2023-06-24)

2.1.26 (2023-06-14)

  • add LICENSE files (#476)
  • remove rosbuild packages from jsk_3rdparty/package.xml (#475)
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.25 (2023-06-08)

  • [OSQP] add a wrapper package for OSQP, which is a library to solve QP (#442)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo in package.xml (#426)
  • Add nfc_ros (#406)
  • add zdepth and zdepth_image_transport package (#389)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] list all packages in jsk_3rdparty (#424)
  • Contributors: Aoi Nakane, Kei Okada, Koki Shinjo, Moju Zhao, Naoto Tsukamoto, Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.24 (2021-07-26)

2.1.23 (2021-07-21)

2.1.22 (2021-06-10)

  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo of dirname (#238)
  • Contributors: Koki Shinjo

2.1.15 (2019-12-12)

  • [dialogflow_task_executive] add dialogflow_task_executive run_depend in jsk_3rdparty (#183)
  • Contributors: Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.14 (2019-11-21)

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package jsk_3rdparty

2.1.31 (2025-05-13)

  • jsk_3rdparty/package.xml: add emotion_analyzer, gdrive_Ros, voccevox, remove slic
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.30 (2025-05-10)

2.1.29 (2025-01-05)

2.1.28 (2023-07-24)

2.1.27 (2023-06-24)

2.1.26 (2023-06-14)

  • add LICENSE files (#476)
  • remove rosbuild packages from jsk_3rdparty/package.xml (#475)
  • Contributors: Kei Okada

2.1.25 (2023-06-08)

  • [OSQP] add a wrapper package for OSQP, which is a library to solve QP (#442)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo in package.xml (#426)
  • Add nfc_ros (#406)
  • add zdepth and zdepth_image_transport package (#389)
  • [jsk_3rdparty] list all packages in jsk_3rdparty (#424)
  • Contributors: Aoi Nakane, Kei Okada, Koki Shinjo, Moju Zhao, Naoto Tsukamoto, Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.24 (2021-07-26)

2.1.23 (2021-07-21)

2.1.22 (2021-06-10)

  • [jsk_3rdparty] fix typo of dirname (#238)
  • Contributors: Koki Shinjo

2.1.21 (2020-08-19)

2.1.18 (2020-07-20)

2.1.17 (2020-04-16)

2.1.16 (2020-04-16)

2.1.15 (2019-12-12)

  • add gdrive_ros package (#182)
  • [dialogflow_task_executive] add dialogflow_task_executive run_depend in jsk_3rdparty (#183)
  • Contributors: Shingo Kitagawa

2.1.14 (2019-11-21)

  • Add sesame_ros package (#176)
  • Contributors: Yuto Uchimi
